title: proselias sanguinolentus
intro: Proselias sanguinolentus, also known as blood-root, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its red or yellow sap and clusters of small white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and gas. Proselias sanguinolentus is also valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and acting as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of blood-root, including tinctures and infusions, are often used to treat various ailments, although caution is advised due to potential toxicity and side effects.
